name: fiber-fueled
description: Dr. Will Bulsiewicz's 'Fiber Fueled' — a complete plant-based gut health program for losing weight, restoring health, and optimizing your microbiome through fiber-rich foods, short-chain fatty acids, the 4-week program, and personalized food reintroduction strategies.
useCase: Improving gut health through a plant-based fiber-rich diet, understanding the microbiome, healing digestive issues, managing food sensitivities, and reducing risk of chronic disease through postbiotics and short-chain fatty acids.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for medical advice — consult a doctor before changing your diet significantly
Some people with severe IBS or SIBO may need a more gradual approach
The 4-week program requires significant dietary changes
Individual results vary based on microbiome composition and health history
